text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's time for the Sapporo Kinen,<n>Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hm? There's a decorative tree over<n>in the corner...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The name has a nice ring to it and all,<n>but what's it
doing here?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it says here that the lilac is the<n>official tree of
Sapporo.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ooh! This is a very auspicious omen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What are the chances that this lilacwould be blooming now?! Lilac hasthe same amount of letters as"lucky", and they both start with l. This has to mean something!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O great gods of the north, I humbly<n>accept this
blessing.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Grant us good fortune. And, if<n>possible, some of
that famous<n>Sapporo lamb barbecue too.
